name: triads-audible
note: S-TRIADS-AUDIBLE + S-RN-STYLE (operator UAT 2026-07-10): inversion chord cards are tap-to-hear buttons - a tap strums the card's exact voicing from the ACTIVE profile's open-string frequencies (accurate per instrument by construction, shared ChordAudio engine) - and standalone I/IV/V numerals in prose carry the .rn style so they don't blend into sentences. Tap runs under the runner's zero-console-error policy, so an audio failure fails the scenario.

steps.label: cards are keyboard-reachable buttons with a Play label
roman numerals styled in prose (.rn present in lede, transitions, and card notes)
strum engine loaded and profile carries open-string freqs (tap path live)
